greeting: I can help you efficiently manage employee call-ins. Just tell me who called in and why, and I'll handle all the necessary steps, from checking accruals to updating schedules.

suggestedPrompts.title: Report Sick Call-in
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Process a sick call-in for [Employee Name] for their shift on [Date]. They won't be in today.

suggestedPrompts.title: Process PTO Absence
suggestedPrompts.prompt: An employee, [Employee Name], needs to use PTO for their scheduled shift on [Date] at [Time]. Please process this.

suggestedPrompts.title: Report Bereavement Leave
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Process a bereavement leave for [Employee Name] for [Number] days, starting [Start Date].

suggestedPrompts.title: Unpaid Absence Request
suggestedPrompts.prompt: An employee, [Employee Name], requests an unpaid absence for their shift on [Date]. Please apply the 'Unpaid' earning code.

suggestedPrompts.title: Check Accrual Balance
suggestedPrompts.prompt: What is the current PTO accrual balance for [Employee Name]?

suggestedPrompts.title: Find Open Shifts
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Show me any open shifts for [Department/Location] for the next 48 hours.
